original:
---
name: agents-directory
description: Developer reference for all 11 Oh My OpenAgent agent definitions, factory patterns, tool restrictions, and model routing.
---
zh_tw:
---
name: agents-directory
description: 供開發者參考的文件，涵蓋 11 個 Oh My OpenAgent agent 定義、工廠模式、工具限制與模型路由。
---

original: 11 built-in agents. Type enum: [`src/config/schema/agent-names.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/config/schema/agent-names.ts) `BuiltinAgentNameSchema`. 10 of them register via [`builtin-agents.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/builtin-agents.ts) `agentSources` record (factory functions). **Prometheus is special-cased** — it has no `createPrometheusAgent` factory; instead [`prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/plugin-handlers/prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts) constructs its config directly during `agent-config-handler` Phase 3.
zh_tw: 11 個內建 agent。型別 enum：[`src/config/schema/agent-names.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/config/schema/agent-names.ts) `BuiltinAgentNameSchema`。其中 10 個透過 [`builtin-agents.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/builtin-agents.ts) 的 `agentSources` record（工廠函式）註冊。**Prometheus 為特殊處理** — 它沒有 `createPrometheusAgent` 工廠；相反地，[`prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/plugin-handlers/prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts) 會在 `agent-config-handler` 第 3 階段直接建構其設定。

original: All factories follow `createXXXAgent(model) → AgentConfig`. Each carries a static `mode` property (`AgentFactory` type in [`src/agents/types.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/types.ts)). Composed via `buildAgent()`.
zh_tw: 所有工廠都遵循 `createXXXAgent(model) → AgentConfig`。每個工廠都帶有一個靜態 `mode` 屬性（[`src/agents/types.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/types.ts) 中的 `AgentFactory` 型別）。透過 `buildAgent()` 組合。

original: Modes verified from each agent file's `const MODE: AgentMode = ...` and (for Prometheus) [`prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts:100`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/plugin-handlers/prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts#L100). Chains verified from [`src/shared/model-requirements.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/shared/model-requirements.ts).
zh_tw: 模式已由各 agent 檔案中的 `const MODE: AgentMode = ...` 以及（針對 Prometheus）[`prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts:100`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/plugin-handlers/prometheus-agent-config-builder.ts#L100) 驗證。鏈已由 [`src/shared/model-requirements.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/shared/model-requirements.ts) 驗證。

original:
| Agent | Default Model | Temp | Mode | Fallback (after default) | Purpose |
|-------|---------------|------|------|--------------------------|---------|
| **Sisyphus** | claude-opus-4-7 max | (model default) | primary | kimi-k2.6 → k2p5 → kimi-k2.5 → gpt-5.5 medium → glm-5 → big-pickle | Main orchestrator, plans + delegates; `thinking: { type: "enabled", budgetTokens: 32000 }` |
| **Hephaestus** | gpt-5.5 medium | (model default) | primary | (single-entry chain — `requiresProvider`: openai \| github-copilot \| venice \| opencode \| vercel) | Autonomous deep worker |
| **Oracle** | gpt-5.5 high | 0.1 | subagent | gemini-3.1-pro high → claude-opus-4-7 max → glm-5.1 | Read-only consultation |
| **Librarian** | gpt-5.4-mini-fast | 0.1 | subagent | qwen3.5-plus → minimax-m2.7-highspeed → minimax-m2.7 → claude-haiku-4-5 → gpt-5.4-nano | External docs/code search |
| **Explore** | gpt-5.4-mini-fast | 0.1 | subagent | qwen3.5-plus → minimax-m2.7-highspeed → minimax-m2.7 → claude-haiku-4-5 → gpt-5.4-nano | Contextual grep |
| **Multimodal-Looker** | gpt-5.5 medium | 0.1 | subagent | kimi-k2.6 → glm-4.6v → gpt-5-nano | PDF/image analysis |
| **Metis** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | **0.3** | subagent | claude-opus-4-7 max → gpt-5.5 high → glm-5.1 → k2p5 | Pre-planning consultant |
| **Momus** | gpt-5.5 xhigh | 0.1 | subagent | claude-opus-4-7 max → gemini-3.1-pro high → glm-5.1 | Plan reviewer |
| **Atlas** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | 0.1 | primary | kimi-k2.6 → gpt-5.5 medium → minimax-m2.7 | Todo-list orchestrator |
| **Prometheus** | claude-opus-4-7 max | (override-only) | primary | gpt-5.5 high → glm-5.1 → gemini-3.1-pro | Strategic planner (interview); built via `buildPrometheusAgentConfig` (not in `agentSources`) |
| **Sisyphus-Junior** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | 0.1 (`SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS`) | subagent | kimi-k2.6 → gpt-5.5 medium → minimax-m2.7 → big-pickle | Category-spawned executor |
zh_tw:
| Agent | 預設模型 | Temp | 模式 | 後備（在預設之後） | 用途 |
|-------|---------------|------|------|--------------------------|---------|
| **Sisyphus** | claude-opus-4-7 max | (模型預設值) | primary | kimi-k2.6 → k2p5 → kimi-k2.5 → gpt-5.5 medium → glm-5 → big-pickle | 主要協調者，負責規劃與委派；`thinking: { type: "enabled", budgetTokens: 32000 }` |
| **Hephaestus** | gpt-5.5 medium | (模型預設值) | primary | （單一項目鏈 — `requiresProvider`: openai \| github-copilot \| venice \| opencode \| vercel） | 自主深度工作者 |
| **Oracle** | gpt-5.5 high | 0.1 | subagent | gemini-3.1-pro high → claude-opus-4-7 max → glm-5.1 | 唯讀諮詢 |
| **Librarian** | gpt-5.4-mini-fast | 0.1 | subagent | qwen3.5-plus → minimax-m2.7-highspeed → minimax-m2.7 → claude-haiku-4-5 → gpt-5.4-nano | 外部文件／程式碼搜尋 |
| **Explore** | gpt-5.4-mini-fast | 0.1 | subagent | qwen3.5-plus → minimax-m2.7-highspeed → minimax-m2.7 → claude-haiku-4-5 → gpt-5.4-nano | 情境化 grep |
| **Multimodal-Looker** | gpt-5.5 medium | 0.1 | subagent | kimi-k2.6 → glm-4.6v → gpt-5-nano | PDF／圖片分析 |
| **Metis** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | **0.3** | subagent | claude-opus-4-7 max → gpt-5.5 high → glm-5.1 → k2p5 | 預先規劃顧問 |
| **Momus** | gpt-5.5 xhigh | 0.1 | subagent | claude-opus-4-7 max → gemini-3.1-pro high → glm-5.1 | 規劃審閱者 |
| **Atlas** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | 0.1 | primary | kimi-k2.6 → gpt-5.5 medium → minimax-m2.7 | 待辦清單協調者 |
| **Prometheus** | claude-opus-4-7 max | (僅覆寫) | primary | gpt-5.5 high → glm-5.1 → gemini-3.1-pro | 策略規劃者（訪談）；透過 `buildPrometheusAgentConfig` 建構（不在 `agentSources` 中） |
| **Sisyphus-Junior** | claude-sonnet-4-6 | 0.1 (`SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS`) | subagent | kimi-k2.6 → gpt-5.5 medium → minimax-m2.7 → big-pickle | 類別派生的執行者 |

original:
| Agent | Denied Tools |
|-------|-------------|
| Oracle | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Librarian | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Explore | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Multimodal-Looker | ALL except read |
| Atlas | task, call_omo_agent |
| Momus | write, edit, task |
| Prometheus | enforces `.md`-only writes via `prometheus-md-only` hook (path-based, not tool-based) |
zh_tw:
| Agent | 禁用工具 |
|-------|-------------|
| Oracle | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Librarian | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Explore | write, edit, task, call_omo_agent |
| Multimodal-Looker | 除 read 之外的所有工具 |
| Atlas | task, call_omo_agent |
| Momus | write, edit, task |
| Prometheus | 透過 `prometheus-md-only` hook 強制僅能寫入 `.md`（基於路徑，不是基於工具） |

original: Authoritative registry: [`AGENT_ELIGIBILITY_REGISTRY`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/features/team-mode/types.ts) in `team-mode/types.ts`. Three verdict tiers:
zh_tw: 權威註冊表：`team-mode/types.ts` 中的 [`AGENT_ELIGIBILITY_REGISTRY`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/features/team-mode/types.ts)。三種判定層級：

original:
| Verdict | Agents |
|---------|--------|
| `eligible` | sisyphus, atlas, sisyphus-junior |
| `conditional` | hephaestus (lacks `teammate: "allow"` permission by default — see D-36 / `tool-config-handler.ts`; use `subagent_type: "sisyphus"` instead) |
| `hard-reject` | oracle, librarian, explore, multimodal-looker, metis, momus, prometheus (each with a specific rejection message) |
zh_tw:
| 判定 | Agents |
|---------|--------|
| `eligible` | sisyphus, atlas, sisyphus-junior |
| `conditional` | hephaestus（預設缺少 `teammate: "allow"` 權限 — 參見 D-36 / `tool-config-handler.ts`；請改用 `subagent_type: "sisyphus"`） |
| `hard-reject` | oracle, librarian, explore, multimodal-looker, metis, momus, prometheus（各自都有特定的拒絕訊息） |

original: Read-only agents are rejected at TeamSpec parse time. For those, the lead delegates via `task` (delegate-task) instead. See [`team-mode/AGENTS.md`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/features/team-mode/AGENTS.md).
zh_tw: 唯讀 agents 會在 TeamSpec 解析時被拒絕。對於這些 agents，主控會改用 `task`（delegate-task）進行委派。請參見 [`team-mode/AGENTS.md`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/features/team-mode/AGENTS.md)。
